daily.today_energy: Your aura's giving main character energy today, Libra. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to trust your gut over overthinking. Something subtle shifts in your favor—stay alert for synchronicities.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or single, authenticity is your love language rn. If you've been holding back your true self, today's the day to let someone see the real you. Vulnerability hits different when it's genuine.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving skills are *chef's kiss* today. That project you've been hesitant about? Your energy suggests it's ready to level up. Trust your instincts on which direction to take next.
daily.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest, not just screen-scrolling. Whether it's a walk, stretching, or actually sitting in silence—listen to what recharges you. Your nervous system will thank you.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about recalibrating your vibe. Mercury's got you thinking differently about your priorities, and honestly? That's the tea. Trust the little shifts happening internally—they're setting you up for something bigger.
weekly.love: Your people are feeling your energy shifts, and that's creating space for real conversations. Whether you're coupled or solo, authenticity is your love language rn. Don't force anything; let things unfold naturally with intention.
weekly.career: Ideas are flowing but slow down before acting on all of them. This is a great week to organize your vision and pitch what's been cooking in your mind. Your creative energy is magnetic—use it to magnetize the right opportunities.
weekly.health: Your nervous system is asking for grounding practices. Think: walks without your phone, journaling, or whatever makes you feel rooted. Movement that feels good, not punishing, is your secret weapon this week.
